zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill於1501年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾洛華諾時，他的父親William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill11498歲，母親Baroness Margaret Montgomery14歲。他於1538年4月7日與Lady Isabel Hamilton在蘇格蘭雷福福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1576年1月17日在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾洛華諾享年75歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾洛華諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill于1501年出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾洛華諾时，他的父亲William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill11498岁，母亲Baroness Margaret Montgomery14岁。他于1538年4月7日与Lady Isabel Hamilton在苏格兰雷福福爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1576年1月17日在英国苏格兰雷福福爾洛華諾享年75岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾洛華諾。

nameMeanings.name: Sempill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Semple
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): nickname from Middle English, Older Scots, and Old French simple ‘simple, straightforward, humble’ (from Latin simplus). The Scottish name was taken to Ulster in the 17th century, and a Scottish family of this name held the hereditary post of Sheriff of Renfrewshire from the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill was born in 1501, in Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill, was 11498 and his mother, Baroness Margaret Montgomery, was 14. He married Lady Isabel Hamilton on 7 April 1538, in Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 17 January 1576, in Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill est né en 1501, à Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill, avait 11498 ans et sa mère, Baroness Margaret Montgomery, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabel Hamilton le 7 avril 1538, à Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1576, à Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill 1501 in Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill 11498 und seine Mutter Baroness Margaret Montgomery 14. Er hat am 7. April 1538 in Renfrewshire, Scotland Lady Isabel Hamilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Januar 1576 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill è nato il nel 1501 nel Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill, aveva 11498 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Margaret Montgomery, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabel Hamilton il 7 aprile 1538, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 gennaio 1576, nel Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempillが1501年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアロチウィノチで生まれた時，父William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempillは11498歳，母Baroness Margaret Montgomeryは14歳であった。1538年4月7日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアでLady Isabel Hamiltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1576年1月17日にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアロチウィノチで75歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアロチウィノチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill(이)가 1501년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 럭윈옥h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill(은)는 11498세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Margaret Montgomery(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1538년 4월 7일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 Lady Isabel Hamilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1576년 1월 17일 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 럭윈옥h에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 럭윈옥h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill nasceu em 1501, em Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill, tinha 11498 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Margaret Montgomery, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabel Hamilton em 7 de abril de 1538, em Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1576, em Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill родился в 1501 г. в местности лочвиннох, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill было 11498 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Margaret Montgomery, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabel Hamilton 7 апреля 1538 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 января 1576 г. в местности лочвиннох, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности лочвиннох, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill nació en 1501, en Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill, tenía 11498 años y su mamá, Baroness Margaret Montgomery, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Lady Isabel Hamilton el 7 de abril de 1538, en Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de enero de 1576, en Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
